parameters.query:
SELECT
  s.store_id,
  s.store_description,
  s.time_zone,
  s.post_auth_type,
  MAX(sc.channel_chat_id)              AS channel_chat_id,
  MAX(sc.discussion_chat_id)            AS discussion_chat_id,
  MAX(sc.max_channel_id)                AS max_channel_id,
  MAX(sc.tg_invite_url_channel_friend)  AS tg_invite_url_channel_friend,
  MAX(sc.max_invite_url_channel_friend) AS max_invite_url_channel_friend
FROM coop.order_store s
JOIN coop.store_channel sc ON sc.store_id = s.store_id
WHERE (sc.channel_chat_id IS NOT NULL 
       OR sc.max_channel_id IS NOT NULL)
  AND s.time_zone IN (3, 7)
GROUP BY s.store_id, s.store_description, s.time_zone, s.post_auth_type
ORDER BY s.time_zone, s.store_id;
